title: BudgetGate Decision
description: Serialized output of budgetgate.Decision.to_dict(). Spend governance evaluation result.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Consumers must check this before parsing.

reason.description: Block reason. Null when status is ALLOW.

message.description: Human-readable explanation. Null when status is ALLOW.

spent_in_window.description: Total spend in current window as decimal string. String preserves arbitrary precision.

requested.description: Requested spend amount as decimal string.

remaining.description: Remaining budget in window as decimal string.
